codeReview.summary: The feature delivers most pending-branch polling behaviors (monotonic elapsed timer, retry cadence, propagation window cutoff, unreachable handling, and button semantics), but two required behaviors are not fully satisfied.

issues.description: Feature requirements call out that sentiments.cc 5xx should classify as AuthUnreachable, but probe_credentials still maps non-401/403 HTTP status responses to AuthServerError. SetupScreen works around this in UI logic, but the classification requirement itself is not implemented.

Pending instructions include a github-auth branch (`gh auth login` guidance), but no code path ever sets `_verification_action` to `"github-auth"` (assignments only set github-ssh/github-gpg/openpgp/manual/gist). The required gh-failure-specific pending copy is therefore unreachable.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `tui-worker` skill's allowed-touch file list is outdated for this mission: it omits `client/cc_sentiment/signing/discovery.py`, even though mission guidance explicitly permits narrow helper-level changes there for remote reachability assertions.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/tui-worker/SKILL.md "When to Use This Skill" section lists setup/dialog/widgets/status/tests only; mission AGENTS.md includes an explicit exception for signing/discovery.py; handoff.skillFeedback.suggestedChanges requests adding discovery.py to skill guidance.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Contract and implementation drift exists around 5xx probe classification: the contract text expects AuthUnreachable for sentiments.cc 5xx, but implementation still emits AuthServerError and feature tests validate the UI workaround instead of result type semantics.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: validation-contract.md VAL-FLOW-038 states 5xx should classify as AuthUnreachable; client/cc_sentiment/upload.py:193 returns AuthServerError for non-401/403 HTTPStatusError; client/tests/test_tui.py test_setup_pending_sentiments_five_xx_unreachable_uses_pending_copy_five_xx_unreachable stubs AuthServerError.

summary: Reviewed handoff, commit b906b60 diff, transcript skeleton, and skill/procedure context. Found two blocking gaps: 5xx classification remains AuthServerError (not AuthUnreachable as required) and the github-auth pending-instructions branch is dead/unreachable. Recorded shared-state observations on skill scope drift and contract/implementation drift.
